# 平安扣 Pinankou — Visual Design System (Refined v1)

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

平安扣 is a **personal safety companion** for people who manage risk as part of daily work — not a corporate dashboard, not a panic app. The mood is **calm authority**: the interface feels like a well-designed safety manual come to life — clear when urgency matters, quiet when it doesn't.

The visual direction moves beyond a single teal wash into a **layered seascape palette**: deep ocean teal, tidal green, sea-glass highlights, and foam whites. Cards feel like frosted glass held against a teal-lit wall. We use **gradients, inner glows, and subtle noise-free textures** to escape the flat-AI-template look.

**Key Characteristics:**
- Page canvas: `#F3F8F8` — a very light blue-green gray, like morning light on water.
- Primary action: deep teal `#0A6E73` with a brighter `#16B8A6` glow.
- Status colors are desaturated and harmonious: moss green for done, burnt amber for warning, soft coral for danger.
- Cards are large, rounded (22px), with soft compound shadows and faint top-edge highlights.
- Dashboard hero uses a **diagonal teal gradient** with abstract translucent rings to suggest a "safety halo" / 平安扣 amulet shape.
- Bottom tab bar floats as a **rounded glass lozenge** with a subtle inner shadow, not a flat strip.
- Typography is tight and modern; numbers are emphasized as data objects.

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Primary Ocean Family
| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Ocean Deep | `#0A6E73` | Primary CTA, active states, hero gradient start |
| Ocean Mid | `#0D9F9C` | Secondary actions, active chips, links |
| Sea Glass | `#4DD9C8` | Accents, chart fills, gradient end |
| Foam | `#E8F7F6` | Tonal surfaces, selected states, badges |
| Mist | `#F3F8F8` | Page background |

### Semantic Accents
| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Moss Done | `#2A9D6E` | Resolved / completed / safe |
| Burnt Amber | `#D4932A` | In progress / medium severity / warning |
| Soft Coral | `#DC5B5B` | Overdue / critical / error |
| Sky Info | `#3A8DDE` | Info / links / secondary highlights |
| Storm Slate | `#5D7A85` | Secondary text, icons |

### Neutrals
| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Whitecap | `#FFFFFF` | Cards, sheets |
| Haze | `#E2EBEC` | Dividers, borders |
| Shale | `#9FB0B6` | Placeholder, disabled |
| Ink | `#1D2E35` | Primary text |
| Deep Ink | `#0F1C22` | Headlines |

### Surfaces & State
- Card: `#FFFFFF` with 1px inset top highlight `rgba(255,255,255,0.7)`
- Card pressed: `#F0F7F7`
- Input: `#FFFFFF` border `#D7E3E4`
- Input focused: border `#0D9F9C`, glow `0 0 0 4px rgba(13,159,156,0.10)`
- Disabled: bg `#F0F4F5`, text `#9FB0B6`
- Glass nav: `rgba(255,255,255,0.84)` + `backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(160%)` + border `rgba(215,227,228,0.6)`

### Shadows
- Card Float: `0 10px 30px rgba(10,110,115,0.07), 0 2px 8px rgba(10,110,115,0.04)`
- Button Glow: `0 8px 22px rgba(13,159,156,0.30)`
- Nav Float: `0 -8px 28px rgba(10,110,115,0.06)`
- Sheet Open: `0 -16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)`

## 3. Typography Rules

### Font Family
- Primary: `HarmonyOS Sans`, `PingFang SC`, `Noto Sans SC`, `-apple-system`, `BlinkMacSystemFont`, sans-serif
- Numeric: `HarmonyOS Sans Number`, tabular-nums

### Hierarchy
| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing |
|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|
| Display | 34px | 700 | 1.12 | -0.6px |
| H1 | 26px | 700 | 1.22 | -0.4px |
| H2 | 21px | 700 | 1.28 | -0.2px |
| H3 | 18px | 600 | 1.32 | 0 |
| Body | 15px | 400 | 1.55 | 0 |
| Caption | 13px | 500 | 1.42 | 0 |
| Micro | 11px | 600 | 1.30 | 0.3px (uppercase optional) |
| Data Large | 38px | 700 | 1.05 | -1.2px |
| Data Medium | 26px | 700 | 1.10 | -0.6px |

## 4. Component Stylings

### Primary CTA
- Background: linear-gradient(135deg, `#0A6E73`, `#0D9F9C`)
- Text: white
- Radius: 16px
- Padding: 15px 26px
- Font: 16px weight 700
- Shadow: `0 8px 22px rgba(13,159,156,0.30)`
- Active: translateY(1px), shadow reduced, gradient darkens

### Secondary Button
- Background: white
- Border: 1.5px solid `#D7E3E4`
- Text: `#0A6E73`
- Radius: 14px
- Padding: 13px 22px
- Active: bg `#E8F7F6`

### Filter Pills
- Inactive: bg `#FFFFFF`, border `#E2EBEC`, text `#5D7A85`
- Active: bg `#E8F7F6`, border `#4DD9C8`, text `#0A6E73`
- Radius: 22px
- Padding: 9px 18px

### Cards
- Bg: `#FFFFFF`
- Radius: 22px
- Padding: 20px
- Shadow: `0 10px 30px rgba(10,110,115,0.07), 0 2px 8px rgba(10,110,115,0.04)`

### List Rows
- Bg: white when inside card; separator `#F0F6F6`
- Padding: 16px
- Left: 40px rounded icon box in tonal color + title/description stack + right chevron
- Radius 18px when individually carded

### Inputs
- Bg: white
- Border: 1.5px `#D7E3E4`
- Radius: 14px
- Padding: 15px 17px
- Label: 12px `#5D7A85` weight 600 above
- Focus: border `#0D9F9C`, glow ring

### Status Badges
| Status | Background | Text |
|--------|------------|------|
| 待处理 | `#E8F7F6` | `#0A6E73` |
| 处理中 | `#FDF5E4` | `#B87A1E` |
| 已完成 | `#E5F5EE` | `#237E59` |
| 已逾期 | `#FCE8E8` | `#B94444` |
| 紧急 | `#DC5B5B` | `#FFFFFF` |

### Floating Bottom Tab Bar
- Container: fixed bottom, width 100% max 390px, centered, padding 10px 16px 26px
- Bar: height 62px, radius 31px, glass bg, shadow
- Items: 5, icon 24px + label 11px weight 600
- Active: `#0A6E73` with a small 4px dot below icon (optional) or filled icon
- Inactive: `#9FB0B6`

## 5. Layout Principles

### Page Container
- Max width: 390px, centered
- Horizontal padding: 18px
- Top safe area: 56px status assumed
- Bottom safe area: 100px for nav

### Spacing Scale
- 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48, 64px

### Hero Card
- Height: ~210px
- Background: `linear-gradient(135deg, #0A6E73 0%, #0D9F9C 55%, #4DD9C8 100%)`
- Decorative: two offset white rings at 8% opacity (suggesting 平安扣 amulet)
- Top: small "今日" label + date
- Middle: greeting line + two compact quick-action pills
- Bottom: circular progress ring (SVG) + safety score text

### Dashboard Summary Grid
- 2 columns, gap 12px
- Cards: white, 18px radius, icon box (44px rounded), large number, caption label

### List Pages
- Sticky filter row with horizontal scroll of pills
- Rounded white card containing list rows
- FAB-style add button optionally at bottom-right above nav

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Treatment |
|-------|-----------|
| Page | `#F3F8F8` |
| Card | white + compound shadow |
| Floating Button | teal gradient + glow |
| Bottom Nav | glass lozenge + nav shadow |
| Sheet | white, top radius 28px, large open shadow |

## 7. Do's and Don'ts

### Do
- Vary teal hue to create depth and avoid a single-color app.
- Use gradient CTAs and glass surfaces.
- Keep the 平安扣 amulet motif subtle (ring shapes, not literal icon).
- Use status color consistently across all pages.
- Center content column and constrain bottom nav.

### Don't
- Don't use emoji.
- Don't stretch UI to full width on desktop.
- Don't add noisy patterns.
- Don't use more than 2 shadows on one element.

## 8. Responsive Behavior

- Column stays 390px max centered.
- Tab bar same max width.
- Landscape keeps portrait layout.

## 9. Semantic UI Binding

Same as DESIGN.md: all surfaces, IDs, events, and bindings preserved. No changes requested.

# 平安扣 Pinankou — Visual Design System (Refined v2)

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

平安扣 is envisioned as a **daily safety amulet** for frontline workers and managers. The design language is **serene, alert, and materially rich**: soft ceramic surfaces, ocean-teal accents, and a restrained use of warmth (amber/coral) only when the app needs to whisper "pay attention." The result should feel like a premium native tool rather than a generated template.

We deliberately **avoid the common flat-teal-everywhere look** by using a split palette:
- Cool teal for trust and navigation.
- Warm amber/coral for semantic urgency.
- Deep slate for typography so it doesn't fight the teal.
- Multiple tonal layers of white/foam/mist to create elevation without heavy shadows.

The hero card uses a **diagonal wave gradient** and a subtle double-ring motif referencing the jade 平安扣 (peace buckle). This motif recurs as small decorative rings on empty states and loading moments, giving the app a quiet brand signature.

# 平安扣 Pinankou — Visual Design System (Refined v2)

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

平安扣 is envisioned as a **daily safety amulet** for frontline workers and managers. The design language is **serene, alert, and materially rich**: soft ceramic surfaces, ocean-teal accents, and a restrained use of warmth (amber/coral) only when the app needs to whisper "pay attention." The result should feel like a premium native tool rather than a generated template.

We deliberately **avoid the common flat-teal-everywhere look** by using a split palette:
- Cool teal for trust and navigation.
- Warm amber/coral for semantic urgency.
- Deep slate for typography so it doesn't fight the teal.
- Multiple tonal layers of white/foam/mist to create elevation without heavy shadows.

The hero card uses a **diagonal wave gradient** and a subtle double-ring motif referencing the jade 平安扣 (peace buckle). This motif recurs as small decorative rings on empty states and loading moments, giving the app a quiet brand signature.

**Key Characteristics:**
- Background: `#F2F8F8` — a cool, very light teal gray.
- Primary: deep teal `#096B70` and tidal `#14A3A0`.
- Accent: seafoam `#5FE3D3` for highlights and data fills.
- Success: moss `#249C6D`; warning: amber `#D99A2B`; danger: coral `#D95353`; info: sky `#3A8DDE`.
- Cards: 22px radius, frosted white, compound shadow, top-edge highlight.
- Buttons: gradient primary, tonal secondary, pill filters.

content.subject: Stage 0: Write product spec
content.description: Create .arkpilot/autopilot/spec.md for Pinankou safety app: classify idea, extract requirements, JTBD, page structure, navigation model, data source strategy, target device, acceptance criteria. Keep UI details out.

content.subject: Stage 1: Semantic UI protocol
content.description: Create .arkpilot/designs/ui-tree.json with surfaces (pages/sheets/dialogs), semanticTargets, events, bindings, testTargets for Pinankou app. Lightweight JSON only.

content.subject: Stage 2: Visual design docs
content.description: Generate DESIGN.md, then critique and produce DESIGN1.md, and if needed DESIGN2.md following TEMPLATE_DESIGN.md with teal-blue safety aesthetic, beautiful non-generic mobile UI. Preserve semantic binding section.

content.subject: Stage 3: HTML design artifacts
content.description: Generate .arkpilot/designs/page-<page-id>.html for each route-worthy surface from latest DESIGN*.md and ui-tree.json. Include data-ui-id, contextual SVG titles, sample data, teal-blue styling, bottom tab nav constrained width.

input.content:
# 平安扣 Pinankou — Design Alignment Plan

## 1. Visual Inputs

- **Semantic UI protocol**: `.arkpilot/designs/ui-tree.json`
- **Final DESIGN artifact**: `.arkpilot/designs/DESIGN2.md`
- **HTML artifacts** (route-worthy pages):
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-home-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-matters-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-risks-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-patrol-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-contacts-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-rectification-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-rectification-detail-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-stats-page.html`
- **Form HTML artifacts** (sheets/modals):
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-matter-form-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-risk-form-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-contact-form-page.html`

## 2. Semantic UI Binding

### Surface / Route / Tab Mapping
| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID |
|------------|---------|-------|--------|
| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home |
| matters | matters-page | pages/Matters | tab-safety |
| risks | risks-page | pages/Risks | tab-safety |
| patrol | patrol-page | pages/Patrol | tab-patrol |
| contacts | contacts-page | pages/Contacts | tab-more |
| rectification | rectification-page | pages/Rectification | tab-rectify |
| stats | stats-page | pages/Stats | tab-more |
| matter-form | matter-form-page | pages/MatterForm | — |
| risk-form | risk-form-page | pages/RiskForm | — |
| contact-form | contact-form-page | pages/ContactForm | — |
| rectification-detail | rectification-detail-page | pages/RectificationDetail | — |

### Action / Input / Assertion IDs to Preserve in ArkTS
Use `.id("<semantic-id>")` (or ArkUI equivalent) on the matching interactive element. Do not rename.

**Home**
- `home-add-matter-button` (action: open-matter-form)
- `home-report-risk-button` (action: open-risk-form)
- `home-patrol-start-button` (action: navigate-patrol)
- `home-stats-link` (action: navigate-stats)
- `home-open-matters-count`, `home-unresolved-risks-count`, `home-today-checkpoints-count`, `home-overdue-rectifications-count`, `home-completion-rate` (assertions)
- `home-urgent-list` (list), items `home-urgent-{id}`, empty `home-urgent-empty`

**Matters**
- `matters-add-button` (action: open-matter-form)
- `matters-search-input` (input: /matters/searchQuery)
- `matters-filter-status` (input: /matters/filter/status)
- `matters-list` (list), items `matter-item-{id}`, empty `matters-empty`

**Risks**
- `risks-add-button` (action: open-risk-form)
- `risks-filter-severity`, `risks-filter-status` (inputs)
- `risks-list` (list), items `risk-item-{id}`, empty `risks-empty`

**Patrol**
- `patrol-today-task-card` (assertion)
- `patrol-start-button` (action: start-patrol)
- `patrol-checkpoint-list` (list), items `patrol-checkpoint-{id}`
- `patrol-checkpoint-{id}-clock-button` (action: clock-checkpoint)
- `patrol-checkpoint-{id}-note-input` (input)
- `patrol-progress-bar` (assertion)
- `patrol-complete-button` (action: complete-patrol)

**Contacts**
- `contacts-add-button` (action: open-contact-form)
- `contacts-list` (list), items `contact-item-{id}`, empty `contacts-empty`
- `contact-item-{id}-call-button` (action: call-contact)
- `contact-item-{id}-edit-button` (action: open-contact-form)

**Rectification**
- `rectification-filter-status` (input)
- `rectification-overdue-count` (assertion)
- `rectification-list` (list), items `rectification-item-{id}`, empty `rectification-empty`
- `rectification-detail-status` (assertion)
- `rectification-detail-steps-list` (list), items `rectification-step-{id}`, empty `rectification-steps-empty`
- `rectification-detail-advance-button` (action: advance-rectification)
- `rectification-detail-note-input` (input)

**Stats**
- `stats-period-picker` (input)
- `stats-risk-total-count`, `stats-risk-resolved-count`, `stats-patrol-completion`, `stats-avg-resolution-days` (assertions)
- `stats-risk-category-chart`, `stats-trend-chart` (assertions)

**Forms**
- Matter: `matter-form-title-input`, `matter-form-category-picker`, `matter-form-priority-picker`, `matter-form-description-input`, `matter-form-save-button`, `matter-form-cancel-button`
- Risk: `risk-form-title-input`, `risk-form-severity-picker`, `risk-form-location-input`, `risk-form-description-input`, `risk-form-photo-button`, `risk-form-save-button`, `risk-form-cancel-button`

    svgs = re.findall(r'(<svg\b[^>]*>)', html, re.S)
    for tag in svgs:
        # title must be first child element inside svg
        inner_start = html.find(tag) + len(tag)
        tail = html[inner_start:inner_start+200]
        if not re.match(r'\s*<title>', tail, re.S):
            print(f'FAIL: {f.name} svg missing contextual title')
            fail = True
print('SVG title check passed' if not fail else 'Some SVGs missing title')
